name: Pancit with BBQ Skewer
description: A flavorful pancit noodle dish paired with smoky Filipino-style BBQ skewers, combining savory noodles with grilled sweetness in every bite.

name: Pancit with Lumpiang Shanghai
description: Classic pancit noodles served with crispy golden Lumpiang Shanghai, creating a perfect mix of soft noodles and crunchy spring rolls.

name: Pancit with Siomai
description: Savory pancit noodles paired with juicy steamed siomai dumplings, offering a satisfying combination of textures and Filipino flavors.
